A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. With parameters `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What happens instead. Include error messages or incorrect output values.

## Environment

## Additional Context

Attach relevant logs, screenshots, or output files.
